paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close and a 36.32 percent decrease over a 20-session window. The price data is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing the company's revenue and loss, as well as expectations to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year. The news item is dated July 18, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other forms. The 8-K forms disclose the issuance of convertible senior notes, the resignation of a director, and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
